action_text: Press Escape to close the search-context popover
rationale: The “Choose search context” popover near the global search is likely obstructing interactions on the page; dismissing it will let us use the list controls to filter or search for the report.
Quickly locate a report titled with the word “agent” by using the browser’s Find-in-page, which searches visible text in the current list.

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the reports by title
rationale: Sorting by Title will make it easier to scan alphabetically for a report like “Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Click the list filter icon to open the filter builder
rationale: Enabling the list filter builder allows filtering by Title to directly search for “Incidents by agent.”
If the desired report isn’t initially visible, scrolling the list can reveal more entries to locate the correct report.
